156 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGA
11 houses, 11 kinds of Dainyayoga (yoga of misery) are
formed. If the lord of the 6th does it with the lord of any one
of 1, 2, 3, 4, 5,7, 8, 9, 10 and ! 1 houses, ten kinds of Dainyayoga
are formed. If the lord of the 8th house does the same with the
lord of 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, 9, 10 and II houses, nine kinds of Dainya-
yoga are formed. These three kinds of yoga come to 30 in all.
If the lord of the 3rd exchanges position with that of any of
1, 2, 4. 5, 7, 9, 10 and I I houses, eight kinds of Khalayoga are
formed. So these 38 yogas are unfavourable. The Effects
of Dainyayoga are ; The person will be a fool, reviler, committing
sinful acts, oppressed by enemies, speaking harshly, of wavering
